domain: Inuit qulliq oil lamp (central hearth in igloo/sod-dwelling; flame-keeper woman maintains continuous flame; community gathers around for storytelling, lessons, council; voice-rotation among elders and members; shared circle of light fosters communal bonds)
specific_mechanism: QULLIQ-HEARTH-FLAMEKEEPER: hearth-centred multi-agent LLM council with flame-keeper anchor + voice-rotation. (1) Designate one flame-keeper LLM F that maintains persistent shared context state s_t (continuously updated summary). (2) K participant LLMs {P_1, ..., P_K} arranged around hearth. (3) Per turn t, participant_{t mod K} reads F's s_t + emits contribution c_t; F updates s_{t+1} = update(s_t, c_t). (4) Continuous low-frequency anchor: F maintains gist-embedding e_anchor across all turns (continuous flame). (5) Cohesion bonus: L_coh = -cos(c_t, e_anchor) penalizes drift from hearth context. (6) Differs from R488 MAQAM-LEAD-TARJAMAH (solo+ensemble, no continuous-anchor + no voice-rotation) by flame-keeper continuous-context-anchor + ordered K-rotation.
llm_application: QULLIQ-HEARTH-FLAMEKEEPER hearth flame-keeper context-anchor + K-participant voice-rotation + cohesion bonus. Differs from R392 MAASAI-ILPAYIANI. R403 WELSH-PENILLION. R411 IROQUOIS-CONDOLENCE. R443 ALUNA-COUNCIL. R449 MAPUCHE-PURRUN. R463 HOKULEA-CREW. R465 SALGAN. R488 MAQAM-LEAD-TARJAMAH-DIALOGUE (closest — solo+ensemble, but flame-keeper continuous-anchor + voice-rotation specific). Differs from ALAS 2505.12501 (closest stateful multi-LLM — flame-keeper-anchor specific). MCP 2504.21030 (model context protocol — generic). Collaborative Memory 2505.18279 (shared+private memory). RL Orchestration 2605.02801. Differs by FLAME-KEEPER CONTINUOUS-ANCHOR LLM + K-PARTICIPANT ORDERED VOICE-ROTATION + COHESION BONUS.
novelty_claim: ALAS + MCP + Collaborative Memory + RL Orchestration cover stateful shared-context multi-agent paradigm. QULLIQ-HEARTH-FLAMEKEEPER adds (a) flame-keeper continuous-anchor LLM + (b) K-participant ordered voice-rotation + (c) cohesion bonus output. Recombination — borderline lookup.
content_words: flame-keeper persistent shared context anchor LLM
cohesion bonus output-score with flame-keeper context
